data.body: SESSION CODE REVIEW (config-loop, 2026-06-16, commit d76e2a31). Ran a holistic subagent review of the cumulative session diff (aa5c5fb6..; 9 commits). Verified CORRECT: _env_signature cache-key completeness (all canonical + 5 legacy aliases + policy vars), fail-closed verify gate preserved through caching/strict-keys, stdlib-only core (no new deps), no leftover refs to the 7 removed vars. Fixed 3 findings: (1) ruff — brought the whole tree back to lint+format clean (ruff check + ruff format --check both pass; the PROJECT_ROOT line-removals had left reconciler files non-canonical); (2) compact — load_config ConfigError now a clean Error+exit1, not a traceback; (3) mcp gates — readonly/allow_llm were reported by `rebar config` but read env-only; routed all 3 mcp gates through one _mcp_gate() helper on the typed config so config-file is honored and reported==enforced, with per-gate fail directions (readonly fail-CLOSED like verify; allow_llm/allow_jira_sync fail-safe off). +new tests; full offline suite green (1951). Verify gate untouched.
